'''kadhunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coa|coa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-dh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coa|coa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kadhunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kædhinith|kædhinith]] || [[word:kædhinij|kædhinij]] || [[word:kædhinish|kædhinish]] || [[word:kædhini|kædhini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadhudhunuth|kadhudhunuth]] || [[word:kadhudhunuj|kadhudhunuj]] || [[word:kadhudhunush|kadhudhunush]] || [[word:kadhudhunu|kadhudhunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadhunuth|kadhunuth]] || [[word:kadhunuj|kadhunuj]] || [[word:kadhunush|kadhunush]] || [[word:kadhunu|kadhunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadhufnuth|kadhufnuth]] || [[word:kadhufnuj|kadhufnuj]] || [[word:kadhufnush|kadhufnush]] || [[word:kadhufnuf|kadhufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kadhunuthu|kadhunuthu]] || [[word:kadhunuju|kadhunuju]] || [[word:kadhunushu|kadhunushu]] || [[word:kadhunuku|kadhunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kadhunuth|kadhunuth]] || [[word:kadhunuj|kadhunuj]] || [[word:kadhunush|kadhunush]] || [[word:kadhunu|kadhunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kadhunuthul|kadhunuthul]] || [[word:kadhunujul|kadhunujul]] || [[word:kadhunushul|kadhunushul]] || [[word:kadhunukul|kadhunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kadhunuthuthu|kadhunuthuthu]] || [[word:kadhunujuju|kadhunujuju]] || [[word:kadhunushushu|kadhunushushu]] || [[word:kadhunuku|kadhunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kadhunuthun|kadhunuthun]] || [[word:kadhunujun|kadhunujun]] || [[word:kadhunushun|kadhunushun]] || [[word:kadhunukun|kadhunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kadhunuthuoro|kadhunuthuoro]] || [[word:kadhunujuoro|kadhunujuoro]] || [[word:kadhunushuoro|kadhunushuoro]] || [[word:kadhunukuoro|kadhunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
